rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount. Elec. Code §254.0391 governs political contribution reporting during special legislative sessions. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 254.0391. REPORT DURING SPECIAL LEGISLATIVE SESSION.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and Elec. Code §254.0391.
